member.name: T:System.IntelHex.IntelHexRecordType
member.summary: Record types defined in the IntelHex format.

member.name: T:System.IntelHex.IntelHexRecord
member.summary: Represents IntelHex record.

member.name: T:System.IntelHex.IntelHexRegion
member.summary: Represents the parameters of a segment in a segmented address space.

member.name: F:System.IntelHex.IntelHexRegion.Offset
member.summary: The offset of the segment relative to address zero of the segmented address space.

member.name: F:System.IntelHex.IntelHexRegion.Size
member.summary: The size of a segment relative to address zero of the segmented address space.

member.name: M:System.IntelHex.IntelHexRegion.#ctor(System.Int64,System.Int64)
member.summary: Initializes a new IntelHexRegion object using the given Offset and Size.
member.param: The offset of the segment relative to address zero of the segmented address space.
The size of a segment relative to address zero of the segmented address space.

member.name: T:System.IntelHex.IntelHexSegmentType
member.summary: Defines the data type of the segment.

member.name: T:System.IntelHex.IntelHexSegmentInfo
member.summary: Represents the enhanced parameters of a segment in a segmented address space.

member.name: F:System.IntelHex.IntelHexSegmentInfo.Type
member.summary: Specifies the data type of the segment.

member.name: F:System.IntelHex.IntelHexSegmentInfo.Offset
member.summary: The offset of the segment relative to address zero of the segmented address space. Set according to the data type defined by the value of the Type field.

member.name: F:System.IntelHex.IntelHexSegmentInfo.Size
member.summary: The size of a segment relative to address zero of the segmented address space. Set according to the data type defined by the value of the Type field.

member.name: F:System.IntelHex.IntelHexSegmentInfo.Empty
member.summary: Specifies a 16-bit value that will be used to fill the elements of the output array for which data is missing from the file.

member.name: M:System.IntelHex.IntelHexSegmentInfo.#ctor(System.Int64,System.Int64,System.IntelHex.IntelHexSegmentType,System.UInt16)
member.summary: Initializes a new IntelHexSegmentInfo object using the given Type, Offset, Size and Empty data unit value.
member.param: The offset of the segment relative to address zero of the segmented address space.
The size of a segment relative to address zero of the segmented address space.
Segment data type.
Value for initial filling of the output data array.

member.name: T:System.IntelHex.IntelHexSegment
member.summary: Represents an object containing the data segment of a single segment.

member.name: T:System.IntelHex.IntelHex
member.summary: Contains methods for working with files in the IntelHex format. Reading and writing both individual IntelHex records and entire dumps.

member.name: M:System.IntelHex.IntelHex.Parse(System.String)
member.summary: Decodes the string representation of an IntelHex Record.
member.param: IntelHex Record Image String.
member.returns: A IntelHexRecord object representing a recognized IntelHex record.
member.exception: If the input string does not conform to the IntelHex format, an appropriate exception is thrown.

member.name: M:System.IntelHex.IntelHex.SaveDataBytes(System.UInt16,System.Byte[],System.Int64,System.Int32)
member.summary: Generates a record with IntelHex data as a string. Helper function.
member.param: Data offset in the generated record.
Byte array - data source.
The index in the source array from which the data will be taken.
The number of bytes from which an IntelHex record must be formed.
member.returns: The term representing the generated IntelHex record.
member.exception: The number of data bytes specified is more than 255.

member.name: M:System.IntelHex.IntelHex.SaveDataWords(System.UInt16,System.UInt16[],System.Int64,System.Int32)
member.summary: Generates a record with IntelHex data as a string. Helper function.
member.param: Data offset in the generated record. The byte address is specified.
Array of word - data source.
The index in the source array from which the data will be taken.
The number of words from which an IntelHex record must be formed.
member.returns: The term representing the generated IntelHex record.
member.exception: The number of data bytes specified is more than 127.

member.name: M:System.IntelHex.IntelHex.SaveAddress(System.UInt16)
member.summary: Generates an IntelHex record of type "Extended Linear Address" as a string. Helper function.
member.param: Extended Line Address Value (32-bit address high-order part).
member.returns: The term representing the generated IntelHex record.

member.name: M:System.IntelHex.IntelHex.ReadBytes(System.String,System.Int64)
member.summary: Reads a byte array of data from the specified file in ItelHex format.
member.param: Specifies the name of the file containing the data.
The maximum expected size of the data array.

member.name: M:System.IntelHex.IntelHex.ReadWords(System.String,System.Int64,System.UInt16)
member.summary: Reads an word array of data from the specified file in ItelHex format.
member.param: Specifies the name of the file containing the data.
The maximum expected size of the data array. Specified as a number of 16-bit words.
Specifies a 16-bit value that will be used to fill the elements of the output array of words for which data is missing from the file.
member.returns: An array of read data bytes as an array of 16-bit words.

member.name: M:System.IntelHex.IntelHex.ReadDump(System.String,System.IntelHex.IntelHexRegion[])
member.summary: Reads a complex dump containing segmented data.
member.param: Specifies the name of the file containing the data.
Specifies a variable number of objects describing segments of the address space.
member.returns: An array of data arrays, each representing data from one of the individual segments.

member.name: M:System.IntelHex.IntelHex.ReadDump(System.String,System.IntelHex.IntelHexSegmentInfo[])
member.summary: Reads a complex dump containing segmented data.
member.param: Specifies the name of the file containing the data.
Specifies a variable number of objects describing segments of the address space.
member.returns: List of IntelHexSegment type objects, each representing data from one of the individual segments.

member.name: M:System.IntelHex.IntelHex.SaveBytes(System.String,System.Byte[],System.Int64,System.Boolean,System.Int32)
member.summary: Appends an array of bytes to a file in IntelHex format.
member.param: File name. The file is appended to, not overwritten.
An byte array to save. Saved entirely to a hex file.
The initial offset of the bytes to be saved in the hex file.
Specifies that an end-of-hex file marker should be added after the data being saved.
Specifies the length of one hex data record.
member.exception: The hex string width is set to more than 255 bytes.

member.name: M:System.IntelHex.IntelHex.SaveWords(System.String,System.UInt16[],System.Int64,System.Boolean,System.Int32)
member.summary: Appends an array of 16-bit words to a file in IntelHex format.
member.param: File name. The file is appended to, not overwritten.
An array of words to save. Saved entirely to a hex file.
The initial offset of the words to be saved in the hex file. Specified as a "word address" - NOT a byte address.
Specifies that an end-of-hex file marker should be added after the data being saved.
Specifies the length of one hex data record. Specified in words. The default is 8 words, i.e., 16 bytes per line.
member.exception: The hex string width is set to more than 127 words.

member.name: M:System.IntelHex.IntelHex.SaveBytesReduced(System.String,System.Byte[],System.Int64,System.Boolean,System.Byte,System.Int32)
member.summary: Appends an array of bytes to a file in IntelHex format, excluding empty values.
member.param: File name. The file is appended to, not overwritten.
An byte array to save. Saved entirely to a hex file.
The initial offset of the bytes to be saved in the hex file.
Specifies that an end-of-hex file marker should be added after the data being saved.
Specifies the value of a byte that will be considered empty. Such bytes will be skipped when saving data to a hex file.
Specifies the length of one hex data record.
member.exception: The hex string width is set to more than 255 bytes.

member.name: M:System.IntelHex.IntelHex.SaveWordsReduced(System.String,System.UInt16[],System.Int64,System.Boolean,System.UInt16,System.Int32)
member.summary: Appends an array of 16-bit words to a file in IntelHex format, excluding empty values.
member.param: File name. The file is appended to, not overwritten.
An array of words to save. Saved entirely to a hex file.
The initial offset of the words to be saved in the hex file. Specified as a "word address" - NOT a byte address.
Specifies that an end-of-hex file marker should be added after the data being saved.
Specifies the value of a word that will be considered empty. Such words will be skipped when saving data to a hex file.
Specifies the length of one hex data record. Specified in words. The default is 8 words, i.e., 16 bytes per line.
member.exception: The hex string width is set to more than 127 words.
